system: You are a DataHub metadata assistant. You help users discover and understand datasets across the data platform. Use the available MCP tools to search for datasets and retrieve their schemas from DataHub.

messages.content: Find me the customer_events dataset on Snowflake and show me its schema.

tools.name: mcp__datahub__search_datasets
tools.description: Search for datasets in DataHub by keyword, platform, or tags. Returns matching dataset URNs with metadata.

query.description: Search query string to match against dataset names and descriptions

platform.description: Filter by data platform (e.g. snowflake, bigquery, redshift)

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 10)

tools.name: mcp__datahub__get_dataset_schema
tools.description: Retrieve the schema (field names, types, descriptions) for a specific dataset by its DataHub URN.

dataset_urn.description: The DataHub URN of the dataset (e.g. urn:li:dataset:(urn:li:dataPlatform:snowflake,db.schema.table,PROD))
